rows.operator_action: Confirm all platform profile links are set/live before using first-batch posts for weekly review.
rows.evidence_required: profile_configured=3 and profile gate ready before publish/review.
rows.decision_boundary: Without profile links, do not treat missing clicks as content failure.

rows.operator_action: Publish or verify the first YouTube Shorts post and record the real public post URL.
rows.evidence_required: Three real platform post_url values, not placeholders.
rows.decision_boundary: No public URL means no weekly decision.

rows.operator_action: Backfill site_clicks, quiz_starts and quiz_completions for each published first-batch post.
rows.evidence_required: Each 0 value has a checked platform or site source, not an assumption.
rows.decision_boundary: Zero without source is still unknown.

rows.operator_action: Run the weekly decision evidence checklist and require all evidence rows to complete before ranking content.
rows.decision_boundary: Pending evidence keeps all commerce and winner decisions on HOLD.

rows.operator_action: Regenerate weekly summary, decision gate and review packet before changing the next content batch.
rows.command: python3 tools/promotion_weekly_summary.py && python3 tools/promotion_week_decision_gate.py && python3 tools/promotion_weekly_review_packet.py
rows.decision_boundary: Empty data mode allows only setup, publish, and KPI backfill actions.

rows.operator_action: Check lead demand before building owned assets, Luna packs or paid offer experiments.
rows.decision_boundary: No repeated lead demand means no paid or priority offer build.

rows.operator_action: Use week-decision-gate as the only source of truth for allowed next decisions.
rows.decision_boundary: Do not alter offer order, guardian priority, Luna emphasis, or affiliate weighting unless gate allows it.

rules: Weekly review is not a commerce decision until public URLs, minimum KPIs and evidence rows are complete.
Empty data mode fails closed: keep setup, publishing and KPI backfill only.
Do not pick a winning guardian, change offer order or increase paid CTA from zero or missing data.
Lead and offer experiments require repeated guardian demand, not a single click or template row.
